name: korean-ime
description: Allow people to type Hangul in Chrome/Firefox when the OS does not have a Korean IME installed.

scripts.validate:i18n-vscode: npm run check:i18n-vscode && npm run test:i18n-vscode
scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:chrome: npm run clean && npm run gen-manifest:chrome && cross-env NODE_ENV=production parcel build --dist-dir dist-chrome
scripts.build:firefox: rimraf dist-firefox .parcel-cache && node scripts/build-manifest.mjs firefox && cross-env NODE_ENV=production parcel build --dist-dir dist-firefox && node scripts/patch-firefox-manifest.mjs dist-firefox
scripts.start:chrome: npm run gen-manifest:chrome && cross-env NODE_ENV=development parcel watch src/manifest.json --dist-dir dist-chrome-dev --host localhost --config @parcel/config-webextension
scripts.start:firefox: npm run gen-manifest:firefox && cross-env NODE_ENV=development parcel watch src/manifest.json --dist-dir dist-firefox-dev --host localhost --config @parcel/config-webextension
scripts.build-dev:chrome: npm run clean && npm run gen-manifest:chrome && cross-env NODE_ENV=development parcel build --dist-dir dist-chrome-dev --no-optimize
scripts.build-dev:firefox: npm run clean && npm run gen-manifest:firefox && cross-env NODE_ENV=development parcel build --dist-dir dist-firefox-dev --no-optimize && node scripts/patch-firefox-manifest.mjs dist-firefox-dev
scripts.clean: rimraf dist-chrome dist-chrome-dev dist-firefox dist-firefox-dev obj .parcel-cache coverage src/manifest.json src/content-script/on-screen-keyboard/mode-icons.ts && node scripts/clean-generated-images.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run check-message-keys && npm run check && npm run lint && npm run check-translations && npm test
scripts.package:chrome: npm run validate && npm run build:chrome && node scripts/package.mjs chrome
scripts.package:firefox: npm run validate && npm run build:firefox && npm run lint:firefox && node scripts/package.mjs firefox
scripts.prepare: husky && node scripts/build-manifest.mjs chrome && node scripts/generate-message-keys.mjs

author: Vincent McNabb
